objective: Add dependency validation for core services (snapper and Btrfs root detection) in neos-autoupdate.sh.

constraints.max_surface_area: Limited strictly to adding dependency and environment validation logic at the beginning of neos-autoupdate.sh.
architect_must_obey: Check that the `snapper` binary is available. If missing, log an error message and exit gracefully (exit code 0) so the systemd unit doesn't fail.
Check that the root filesystem is Btrfs. If not, log a warning message and exit gracefully (exit code 0).
Do NOT modify any other logic in `neos-autoupdate.sh` or any other scripts.

Out-of-scope issues from past audit reports (like the pacman.conf build blocker, missing ISO Size Validation, Incomplete Architecture Support, systemd sandboxing, Rust profile audit path traversal, TOCTOU in autoupdate, sudoers vulnerability, and incomplete error handling) are explicitly excluded from this task to enforce the single coherent deliverable constraint.
